gates.reason: Silver tables must maintain entropy stability above 0.70 before Gold refresh. This prevents distribution drift, cardinality collapse, and silent source failures from reaching executive KPIs.
Bronze materialization must preserve at least 99% of source records.
At least 95% of Silver records must pass rule-based quality checks.
All required provenance fields must be emitted for every executed run.
No more than 20% of monitored columns should show entropy drift in a single load cycle.
Quarantined records should not exceed 10% of total Silver input.

decision_rule.pass: All FAIL gates pass and no WARN gate breaches.
decision_rule.warn: All FAIL gates pass but one or more WARN gates breach.
decision_rule.fail: Any FAIL gate breach or missing entropy baseline.
decision_rule.gold_blocked: Gold refresh is blocked when entropy_health_score < 0.70.
